steps.title: Convert square units
steps.content:
Since $1$ meter equals $3.28$ feet, square the conversion factor for area.
$$1\text{ m}^2=(3.28)^2\text{ ft}^2=10.7584\text{ ft}^2$$

steps.title: Convert the time unit
steps.content:
Convert from square feet per hour to square meters per minute by dividing by the square-foot conversion and by $60$ minutes per hour.
$$270\cdot\frac{1}{10.7584}\cdot\frac{1}{60}$$

steps.title: Compute the rate
steps.content: Evaluate the expression. $$\frac{270}{10.7584\cdot60}\sim0.418$$ The closest choice is $0.42$. The answer is A.
